setGigScore(address,uint8).details: Step 3: AI Agent writes GigScore after analyzing Fileverse proof

submitIdentity(string,string).details: Step 1: Worker submits Reclaim identity proof (Aadhaar DigiLocker) Proof is stored encrypted on Fileverse. Only ddocId goes on-chain.

submitIncome(string,string,string).details: Step 2: Worker submits Reclaim income proof (Swiggy / Uber / SBI) Proof is stored encrypted on Fileverse. Only ddocId goes on-chain.

verifyWorker(address).details: Step 4: Lender pays USDC fee to verify worker GigScore
